task_description: Audit the voxpilot VS Code extension for remaining bugs and fix them properly, with real regression tests and full end-to-end verification. Because the npm registry is network-blocked (INTEGRATIONS_ONLY) and the pinned toolchain (vitest/esbuild/eslint/@types) cannot be installed, first build a faithful node:test-based host harness that runs the existing unmodified vitest suite and reproduces a fully-green baseline, then drive a systematic bug audit + fixes verified against that harness plus a bun build smoke check. No shortcuts, no behavior-faking mocks, no disabling tests.
